profile.name: Hariram Murukeshan
profile.tagline: Where Physics Meets Marketing, and Creativity Knows No Bounds
profile.bio: From marketing books at Amazon to exploring quantum mechanics, my path is anything but linear. I believe in the power of interdisciplinary thinking.

popSciArticles.description: Deep dive into classical mechanics, energy conservation, and problem-solving strategies.

marketingProjects.description: How machine learning is reshaping the way we discover books, and what it means for traditional retail.

marketingProjects.title: Marketing in the Age of AI
marketingProjects.description: Exploring how artificial intelligence is transforming marketing strategies and customer engagement.

creativeWorks.description: A tale of forgotten books, quantum entanglement, and the librarian who discovered that stories exist in superposition.
